name: plausible-mcp
description: Query your Plausible Analytics data with AI — traffic, pages, sources, geography, devices, and conversions.
long_description:
An MCP server that connects Claude to your Plausible Analytics account. Ask questions about your website in plain language.

**14 tools included:**
- Real-time visitor count
- Aggregate metrics (visitors, pageviews, bounce rate, etc.)
- Time series / trend analysis
- Top pages, landing pages, exit pages
- Traffic sources, referrers, UTM campaigns
- Geographic breakdown (country, region, city)
- Device, browser, OS breakdown
- Goal conversions
- Custom event properties
- Raw API query for advanced use

api_key.title: Plausible API Key
api_key.description: Your Plausible Analytics API key. Find it at plausible.io → Settings → API Keys.

site_id.title: Site Domain
site_id.description: Your site domain as registered in Plausible, e.g. example.com

base_url.title: Base URL (self-hosted only)
base_url.description: Only needed for self-hosted Plausible instances. Leave empty for plausible.io.
